title: Fixes for rmi
body:
* Switch to using storage APIs that don't bypass locking and synchronization.
* Properly close `Image` objects in a couple of places that we weren't.
* Look up images that may be specified using truncated IDs in `rmi`.
* Wrap some errors.

comments.body: LGTM, should we add a check for rmi a truncated ID?

We should probably have tests for _everything_ with truncated IDs.  A good chunk of that can be taken care of by changes we're making in containers/image (for example, what I'm adding to the top of `storageImageID` here), but those haven't landed yet.

@rh-atomic-bot r+ https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/211/commits/d3fb719d7318c3461d8b358bbe930548900e988f
Ok lets add these tests once your patches land.

@rhatdan Make sure to type in the commit id, not the URL of the commit (the final comment looks the same because of GitHub's autolinking, but rh-atomic-bot expects the SHA there). We also need to restart the deployment to get the fix for SHA-less r+s in: https://github.com/cgwalters/homu/pull/1.
